title: Witherite Plus
description: A fork of FlamingCherry's Witherite mod, which adds Wither related tools
body:
## Witherite is a mod that adds wither related blocks and items.

 

### How to obtain Witherite:
Witherite generates in veins of 1, but spread to adjacent netherrack over time, but only to a certain point.

You can also get Organic Witherite from Wither Skeletons, and use that to make Enriched witherite.

Recipes are designed to be hard to do, as Witherite is a powerful material.

 

## Fabric API is required for use on Fabric.
## QSL is required for use on Quilt
